title: RC-3B-P0B GET_LOCATOR design: template_locator_rule + structural_locator_spec + resolved-locators artifact (closed)
description: LOCAL governance DESIGN artifact (governance tree), NOT repo code. Authorized 2026-07-11 UTC; executed/completed 2026-07-12 UTC. Revised under RC-3B-P0B-C3-R2-R1 then C3-R2-R2 then C3-R2-R3 (final implementation-spec reconciliation; governance date 2026-07-12 UTC). MUST NOT be copied into the repository under this gate. Mirrors evidence-schema.json's closed style: every object sets additionalProperties=false. A value appears in exactly ONE place -- resolved_locators[].normalized_scalar_value -- and only after it has passed a TEMPLATE locator_rule (deny-by-default), the run-plan spec (which may only equal or narrow that rule), the field-path + scalar-type + length-cap + committed-semantic-regex + segment-safe + cross-field gates in GET_LOCATOR, AND a verifier external join. GET_META stays value-free and unchanged. Grants no R2 access.

semantic_type.description: RUN_ID + RUN_ATTEMPT REMOVED under C3-R2-R1 (Blocker 8: producer-provenance, not first-round objective; schema/inventory disagreed on RUN_ATTEMPT type). Re-add only via a separate design gate.

value_pattern_id.description: identifier into the COMMITTED regex registry in C1B code; the regex text is NEVER supplied at dispatch

scalar_type.description: boolean REMOVED under C3-R2-R2 (Blocker 5: no first-round boolean objective; ambiguous canonical bytes)

cross_field_rule_id.description: generic traversal/prefix rules PLUS source-specific derived-key equalities (Blocker 3): a first-use OBJECT_KEY locator must satisfy its exact producer contract, not merely be traversal-free.

artifact_status.description: VERIFIER-derived only; a builder may NOT self-report COMPLETE

object_group_result.description: Blocker 3(R3): per-object-key applicability. For snapshots/latest.json an unreadable/ambiguous object => applicability_status UNRESOLVED + selected_pointer_shape null + group FAILED + whole artifact FAILED; v2 and legacy are NEVER both applicable. Cursor objects are always cursor_v1 and may report diagnostics but cannot restore COMPLETE.

template_get_locator_family.description: Blocker 2: a GET_LOCATOR family binds an EXACT object key (NOT key_prefix/key_suffixes). matchFamily for GET_LOCATOR MUST require plan spec.key === family.exact_key; startsWith+suffix does NOT authorize GET_LOCATOR. exact_key + locator_rules are canonical-hashed. One family = one exact key + its locator_rules[].

template_locator_rule.description: Blocker 1/8: the DENY-BY-DEFAULT unit on a GET_LOCATOR family (bound into the template canonical + raw-file hashes). A run-plan structural_locator_spec may only EQUAL or strictly NARROW one rule; requiredness is MONOTONIC (R.required=true => S.required MUST stay true; R.required=false => S may be false or true). Unique by (exact_key, pointer_shape, field_path).

required.description: Blocker 1: monotonic -- a run-plan spec may promote optional->required but NEVER downgrade required->optional

structural_locator_spec.description: one plan-embedded locator spec; must EQUAL-OR-NARROW exactly one template_locator_rule (checkLocatorSpecs). Bound into canonicalRunPlan.

key.description: EXACT committed object key (no wildcard, no template placeholder)

field_path.description: EXACT top-level scalar property name; own-property only; NO dots/wildcards/JSONPath/brackets

resolved_locator.description: one ADMITTED locator. scalar_type MUST equal the JSON type of normalized_scalar_value (allOf below). source integrity split into three fields. The verifier independently recomputes value_utf8_bytes + value_sha256 and joins every field to the authorized spec (V7-V13).

source_etag.description: the GET response ETag this run (HEAD ETag is a consistency cross-check, NOT the value source)

source_byte_length.description: the exact collected GET Buffer length; HEAD ContentLength is an INDEPENDENT consistency gate (must equal), NOT the value source

source_byte_sha256.description: sha256 of the SAME collected GET Buffer; verifier checks all rows from one object agree

value_utf8_bytes.description: verifier RECOMPUTES from normalized_scalar_value; a false value fails V9

value_sha256.description: verifier RECOMPUTES; a false value fails V10

normalized_scalar_value.description: the admitted scalar; per-semantic-type + per-scalar_type constrained below

unresolved_locator.description: a REQUIRED spec that could not be admitted; carries NO raw value -- only a controlled reason code

template_allowlist_sha256.description: covers the template families INCLUDING their locator_rules (Blocker 1)

locator_spec_set_sha256.description: canonical hash of the sorted structural_locator_specs bound in the run plan; MUST equal the plan's

coverage.description: VERIFIER-derived (V1-V6, V14): the join between the artifact and the applicable authorized spec set; a builder self-report is overwritten by the verifier

artifact_sha256.description: sha256 over the artifact with this one field excluded; independently recomputable by a verifier

_design_notes._comment: properties prefixed with _ are DESIGN annotations, not part of the runtime schema contract. Authorized 2026-07-11 UTC / executed 2026-07-12 UTC. Revised under C3-R2-R1.
_design_notes.three_gate_closure: safety does NOT rest on the Founder reading a run-plan hash. Gate 1 = template EXACT-KEY deny-by-default (family.exact_key + hash-bound locator_rules; a run-plan spec may only EQUAL or NARROW a rule; requiredness monotonic). Gate 2 = the IN-RUN source-binding gate (re-extract from the retained raw bytes + byte-for-byte compare; unskippable branded SourceBoundLocatorResult). Gate 3 = the OFFLINE verifier external join V0-V17 (every artifact row equals an authorized applicable spec; bytes/hash recomputed).
_design_notes.artifact_status_verifier_derived: artifact_status + coverage.* are VERIFIER-derived; an empty resolved+unresolved cannot be COMPLETE when applicable REQUIRED specs exist (V14). A builder may not self-certify COMPLETE.
_design_notes.scalar_type_consistency: scalar_type MUST equal the JSON type of normalized_scalar_value (allOf if/then; scalar_type in {string,integer} ONLY), so e.g. scalar_type=integer + value=string is rejected at schema level; full join is verifier V7/V8
_design_notes.source_integrity_split: source_etag_or_hash REPLACED by source_etag (GET ETag) + source_byte_length (collected GET Buffer length) + source_byte_sha256 (sha256 of that same Buffer); HEAD metadata is an INDEPENDENT consistency gate (HEAD ContentLength == GET ContentLength == Buffer.length; HEAD/GET ETag normalized-equal, else INTEGRITY_ANOMALY), NOT the value source; verifier checks all rows from one object agree (A1)
_design_notes.segment_safe_patterns: path patterns now reject a '.' OR '..' segment ((?:^|/)\.{1,2}(?:/|$)) AND an empty internal segment (//); RELEASE_TOKEN rejects a lone '.'/'..' and any '..'. THE AUTHORITATIVE gate is the code segment-validator (split('/') + reject ''/'.'/'..'/backslash/leading-slash/repeated-slash/control-chars); these regexes are a coarse co-gate (Blocker 4). 'a..b' as a filename is allowed by the traversal rule and decided by the semantic rule, not as a traversal side effect.
_design_notes.source_specific_keys: OBJECT_KEY/MANIFEST_KEY first-use locators MUST additionally satisfy a source-specific derived-key cross_field_rule (e.g. UMLS_MESH_KEY_EQUALS_RELEASE_PATH, FDA_SRS_KEY_EQUALS_RELEASE_DATE_PATH, COMPOUNDS_MANIFEST_EQUALS_FIXED_SUFFIX); generic traversal-free OBJECT_KEY is NOT the final safety boundary (Blocker 3)
_design_notes.run_id_attempt_removed: RUN_ID + RUN_ATTEMPT semantic types REMOVED (Blocker 8); producer-provenance, not first-round objective; schema/inventory had disagreed on RUN_ATTEMPT type
_design_notes.duplicate_json_key: a duplicate top-level key in a pointer object is an integrity anomaly -> LOCATOR_JSON_DUPLICATE_KEY, whole object fails loud, zero locator output (Blocker 5; NOT JSON.parse last-wins). Enforced in code (raw-key scan), reflected here as an unresolved reason_code.
_design_notes.value_free_guarantee: normalized_scalar_value is the ONLY value field; GET_LOCATOR is STRUCTURAL_JSON-only (payload/gzip/zstd/NXVF matrix-denied), so no scientific corpus value can reach it; GET_META stays value-free and unchanged
_design_notes.r2r2_requiredness_monotonic: template_locator_rule.required is a boolean; a run-plan spec may promote optional->required but NEVER downgrade required->optional (Blocker 1; scratch CE1)
_design_notes.r2r2_exact_key_family: GET_LOCATOR authorization is EXACT-KEY (template_get_locator_family.exact_key), NOT startsWith+suffix; one family = one exact key + its locator_rules (Blocker 2; scratch CE2)
_design_notes.r2r2_source_binding: an IN-RUN source-binding gate re-extracts the value from the retained raw pointer bytes and compares byte-for-byte with normalized_scalar_value; the offline verifier cannot re-read R2, so this closes 'value came from the actual source object' (Blocker 3; scratch CE3; reason LOCATOR_SOURCE_MISMATCH)
_design_notes.r2r2_per_object_applicability: applicability is per OBJECT KEY (latest.json v2 XOR legacy; each cursor cursor_v1); the global applicable set is the UNION of the 5 object groups, not one global shape; cursor specs cannot be dropped by choosing v2 (Blocker 4; scratch CE4)
_design_notes.r2r2_canonical_scalar_bytes: value_utf8_bytes + value_sha256 are over canonicalScalarBytes(value, scalar_type) -- string: exact UTF-8 no quotes; integer: safe-int, no -0, canonical base-10; boolean removed; golden vectors shared builder+verifier (Blocker 5; scratch CE5)
_design_notes.r2r2_snapshot_date_required: snapshot_date is a first-run REQUIRED v2 locator so SNAPSHOT_ID_MATCHES_IMMUTABLE_IDENTITY can assert snapshot_id's date-segment == snapshot_date (Blocker 6; scratch CE6)
_design_notes.r2r2_decoded_dup_key: the duplicate-key tokenizer compares DECODED unicode keys (JSON escapes resolved), rejects invalid escape + unpaired surrogate (Blocker 7; scratch CE7)
_design_notes.r2r2_two_phase_uniqueness: cross-field is TWO-PHASE (Phase 1 independent scalars; Phase 2 over the normalized candidate map) so results are spec-order-independent, and a dependent field whose peer failed Phase 1 => LOCATOR_DEPENDENCY_INVALID; uniqueness gates on family_id / (exact_key,pointer_shape,field_path) / spec_id / (key,pointer_shape,field_path) / cross_field_rules (Blocker 8; scratch CE8-CE10)
